_README: TEMPLATE. Copy this file to linkedin_groups.json (which is gitignored / local-only) and replace the examples with your real groups. tier: A = proven engager (strongest hook every time), B = new/testing, C = low/no engagement. active:false skips it. url is optional (the sheet links straight to the group). The prep generator sorts A->B->C and rotates a different hook to each group.

groups.name: Example Group — AI & Machine Learning Professionals
Example Group — Career Development in Tech
